coverSystem.style: Flat gold icons on the navy brand background — one consistent set so the tray reads as a designed row, not a scrapbook.
coverSystem.rule: Same icon weight, same navy background, same gold accent across all covers. Name each highlight in ≤12 chars so it doesn't truncate.
